markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 644. Commercial Motor Vehicle Safety Standards
##### § 644.004 — Applicability to Foreign Commercial Motor Vehicles

Except as otherwise provided by law, this chapter also applies to a foreign commercial motor vehicle, as defined by Section 648.001 (Definitions) .

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.26(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: Except as otherwise provided by law, this chapter also applies to a foreign commercial motor vehicle, as defined by Section 648.001 (Definitions) .
